name: Tiny Tim
title: Last known photo of Tiny Tim, taken on November 30, 1996, at a benefit concert — he collapsed onstage and died shortly after.
description: Tiny Tim was photographed on November 30, 1996, at a benefit gala at the Women's Club of Minneapolis. Despite having been hospitalized just two days earlier on Thanksgiving and showing visible signs of distress, he insisted on performing. During his signature song "Tiptoe Through the Tulips", he collapsed into his wife Miss Sue's arms after just a few bars. Three doctors in the audience attempted resuscitation before he was rushed to the hospital, where staff worked for 45 minutes to revive him. He was pronounced dead at 11:20 PM. He was 64 years old.
bio: Tiny Tim was an American singer, ukulele player, and musical archivist known for his distinctive high-pitched voice and performance of "Tiptoe Through the Tulips". He became a beloved novelty act and cultural curiosity.
